hero.description: A privately owned Mediterranean retreat on the Istrian coast, where Adriatic charm meets genuine Croatian hospitality.

about.label: Since 1997
about.title: Your Home by the Adriatic
about.description1: Hotel Porec is a privately owned hotel located beside the Marina in the heart of Porec, one of the most beautiful coastal towns on the Istrian peninsula. We have been welcoming guests year-round since 1997.
about.description2: Our rooms offer all the comforts you need: air conditioning, private balcony, satellite TV, minibar, in-room safe, free Wi-Fi, and a modern shower. Whether you are here for a family vacation, a romantic getaway, or business travel, we make you feel at home.

mosaic.label: Art & Heritage
mosaic.title: "Ples prirode"
mosaic.subtitle: Dance of Nature — by Eugen Varzić
mosaic.description: A monumental mosaic by the Travisanutto workshop from Spilimberga, Italy — depicting wind, water, and sunlight in the colors of the Istrian coast. Commissioned by the Dugandzic family, it places Porec on the global map of mosaic heritage.
mosaic.quote: “This demonstrates the need for artists and craftsmen to unite, bringing renewed strength to collaboration that enriches our culture and enhances the visual identity of Porec’s seafront.”

rooms.label: Accommodation
rooms.title: Rooms & Suites
rooms.description: From our premium Apartment 401 with whirlpool to comfortable standard rooms, every space is designed for relaxation.

apartment401.name: Apartment 401
apartment401.description: Spacious top-floor apartment with whirlpool bath, separate living area, and panoramic views.

superior.name: Superior Room
superior.description: Elegantly appointed room with premium furnishings, generous space, and modern comfort.

family.name: Family Room
family.description: Designed for families, with extra space and flexible sleeping arrangements for a comfortable stay.

triple.name: Triple Room
triple.description: Comfortable room for three guests with all essential amenities and a private balcony.

standard.name: Standard Room
standard.description: Clean, cozy room with everything you need for a restful stay in Porec.

flex.name: Flex Room
flex.description: Versatile room that adapts to solo travelers or couples with flexible configuration.

restaurant.label: Dining
restaurant.title: Our Restaurant
restaurant.description1: Start every morning with a generous breakfast buffet featuring local and international selections. Fresh bread, Istrian cheeses and cold cuts, seasonal fruits, pastries, and more.
restaurant.description2: For lunch and dinner, our flexible menu offers Mediterranean and Croatian cuisine prepared with fresh, locally sourced ingredients. Enjoy your meal on our terrace with views toward the sea.

contact.label: Best Price Guarantee
contact.title: Book Direct & Save
contact.description: Book directly with us for the lowest rates — guaranteed lower than any booking platform. No middleman, no hidden fees.
contact.comparedTo: compared to Booking.com, Expedia, and other OTAs.
contact.bookDirectly: Book directly — no middleman, no hidden fees.

booking.title: Book Your Stay
booking.subtitle: Best price guaranteed — book directly and save up to 15%.
booking.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Early check-in, extra bed, dietary needs...
booking.emailNote: Opens your email client. We reply within 2 hours during business hours.

footer.description: Privately owned since 1997. Located beside the Marina in the heart of Porec, Croatia. Open year-round.
